title: Deputy Head of Service Desk (FinTech & Operations)

summary.lv: DECTA meklē Service Desk vadītāja vietnieku, kas vadīs darbplūsmas, koordinēs IT un FinTech atbalsta procesus un atbalstīs maksājumu infrastruktūru startupiem un mazām bankām.
summary.en: DECTA is hiring a Deputy Head of Service Desk to manage workflows, coordinate IT and FinTech support processes and support the payment infrastructure for startups and small banks.
